description: A logo for the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS). The logo features a graphic icon on the left and text on the right. The icon is an abstract illustration in lime green, combining elements of a city skyline or buildings on the left with a stylized wheat ear or plant on the right, all partially encircled by a crescent shape. To the right of the icon, the words "Land Monitoring Service" are displayed in a darker shade of green, stacked in two lines: "Land" on the top line and "Monitoring Service" on the bottom line.
